subcodes.first_line: O peerless Lord! Assist the companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá and graciously forgive the sinners [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند بی مانند یاران عبدالبهاء را یاوری کن و گناهکارانرا بزرگواری نما بزم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat]
